data.title: feat: add `SKOGAI.md` root routing file to skogai-caveman
data.description:
Repo: `/home/skogix/.local/src/marketplace/plugins/skogai-caveman`

This repo does not currently have a root `SKOGAI.md`.

Scope:

* decide what repo-local routing/context belongs in `SKOGAI.md`
* add the file at repo root if it adds value distinct from `CLAUDE.md` and `AGENTS.md`
* keep the file focused on SkogAI-specific routing rather than duplicating full documentation
* ensure the three root routing files have clear, non-overlapping roles

Done when the repo has a justified `SKOGAI.md` with a clear routing purpose.
